name: The Marblehead Ferry Dock
description: A stone-and-timber dock on the Lake Erie shore, the water black and cold beyond it, the ferry lantern visible as a point of orange light on the dark water — the captain is there, waiting, but his patience has a clock on it.
atmosphericDetails: The lake wind is sharp and smells of deep water and coming ice — the first freeze is three weeks away.
The ferry captain's signal lantern is showing white, not red — the way is clear for now.
The dock planking is slick with spray and the footing is treacherous for anyone moving fast.
